01 — About

The engineer
behind the code

I am a Senior Frontend Engineer and AI/ML Systems Architect with over five years of experience shipping enterprise products that real people rely on. I currently lead frontend systems at VFXB while building IBIAS and TAXwise, my own AI-native platforms for decision intelligence and financial compliance. My foundation in Astronomy & Physics at the University of Nigeria, Nsukka is what gives my engineering its edge: I think in systems, model for uncertainty, and build for scale.

Across fintech, healthcare, and SaaS, I have served as sole architect and lead engineer on products now used by over 500,000 people. I deploy production ML pipelines, architect real-time data systems, and lead cross-functional teams without sacrificing quality or velocity. I am actively seeking senior and staff-level engineering roles in the United States, and am fully prepared for relocation and visa sponsorship.

🎯 For Recruiters

Senior IC to tech-lead range with a React, TypeScript, and AI stack. Open to FAANG-adjacent companies, Series B/C product startups, and ML-forward engineering teams. Available for full-time roles — remote worldwide or on-site in the United States.
